violations.text: Soap and paper towels were lacking at the kitchen handsink. Soap and paper towels were placed at sink during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Fried Jalapenos were observed held at 99 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview of staff, food was recently prepared. Food was reheated to 192 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized and placed into hot steam well with hot water. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Floor and walls at the walk-in cooler are in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves and fans at the walk-in cooler, hot hold unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The area around and beneath the dumpster has an accumulation of litter and old equipment. The area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The floor and shelves in the retail area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris and old mice droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
The floor in the retail area near to walk-in unit is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Food contact surfaces of meat grinder and bandsaw were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023
Floor at the walk--in cooler is in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023
Faucet at the 3bay sink (kitchen area and meat department is in poor repair). New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
Some floor tiles at the retail area and kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the retail area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2023

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen/hood area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
